svg.title: Three pileup columns — heterozygous SNV, homozygous alternate, noise
svg.desc: Three side-by-side panels at 20-fold coverage, each showing 20 reads stacked at a single reference position. Panel A is a clean heterozygous SNV with balanced REF and ALT counts at uniformly high quality. Panel B is a homozygous alternate site where every read carries the alternate base at high quality. Panel C is a noise column with two non-reference bases that are both at the end of low-quality reads on the same strand. Below each panel a summary table reports REF count, ALT count, mean quality, strand balance, and the inferred genotype with its PHRED-scaled genotype quality.

g.text: THREE PILEUP COLUMNS, ONE REFERENCE POSITION
20-fold coverage. Same column shape, three different inferences.
… 10 more reads, 5 REF + 5 ALT, mixed strand …
every read shows ALT · high Q
… 10 more reads, all ALT, mixed strand …
2 ALT bases — both at low Q, same strand, read ends
… 10 more reads, all REF, mixed strand …
